regions: Europe, the Middle East and Africa (EMEA)

dependencies: Third-party service providers for cloud hosting and technologies supporting cloud-based operations
Third-party providers of technology solutions for Aladdin's data architecture
Third-party data providers for analytical inputs
Third-party pricing vendors for valuation of Level 3 assets
Index providers for ETF and index products
Asset servicers, custodians, fund administrators, transfer agents
risks: Failure of key third-party providers to fulfill obligations could disrupt operations
Concentration of third-party index providers limits renegotiation ability
Reliance on third-party cloud services introduces infrastructure reliability risks
Third-party data quality and availability risks for analytics
Operational errors or failures by third-party servicers
Limited alternative vendors for certain key services

regulatory_risks: Potential designation as Systemically Important Financial Institution (SIFI) by FSOC
SEC proposed rules on equity market structure reforms
SEC rules on short sales and securities loan reporting
SEC predictive data analytics rules for broker-dealers and investment advisers
FinCEN anti-money laundering requirements for registered investment advisers
EU Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) oversight of technology service providers
EU Retail Investment Strategy package amendments
EU EMIR 3.0 changes to clearing, margining and reporting requirements
UK Financial Services and Markets Act 2023 (FSMA) reforms
UK Overseas Fund Regime (OFR) equivalence requirements
UK FCA Consumer Duty conduct regulation
UK Stewardship Code review reforms
Global sustainability regulations (ISSB standards, SEC climate disclosure rules, EU CSRD, CSDDD, Taxonomy Regulation)
EU and UK ESG fund naming rules and ESG rating provider regulations
Money market fund reforms in US, UK and EU
Macroprudential policies for open-ended funds and asset managers
Antitrust rules and merger guidelines (FTC/DOJ Hart-Scott-Rodino amendments)
US DOL fiduciary rule redefining investment advice fiduciary under ERISA
SEC US Treasury clearing mandate
SEC Form PF enhanced reporting requirements
Financial transaction taxes (FTT) proposed in US and EU
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%) implemented in EU and UK
China data security and data transfer regulations
Privacy and data protection laws (GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, CPRA)
Bank Secrecy Act compliance and sanctions regulations (OFAC, UN, EU, HMT)
Securities lending indemnification obligations
Investment Company Act and Investment Advisers Act compliance
ERISA fiduciary duties and prohibited transactions
CFTC and NFA commodity pool operator regulations
OCC banking regulations for BlackRock Institutional Trust Company
Net capital requirements for broker-dealers and regulated subsidiaries

sanction_risks: Strategic competition between US and China creating regulatory uncertainty
Trade tensions and tariff impacts on global markets
Middle East conflicts affecting global economy and markets
Sanctions on Russia impacting investments and operations
China regulatory scrutiny of technology and nationally important industries
Restrictions on business with certain individuals, countries or groups
